summary: Replay ADR 0374 cross-cutting service manifest updates from the latest origin/main and re-apply the affected runtime services.

verification.observed: Live apply completed after passing canonical-truth, vulnerability budget, and interface contract gates.
Live apply completed with the immutable guest replacement override logged in the gate output.
Generated a fresh security posture receipt from cached Lynis output after apt repository errors blocked the full scan.

notes: The security posture scan skipped Lynis and Trivy because the Falco and Netdata apt repositories currently lack Release files, blocking apt cache refresh.
litellm remains governed by the immutable guest replacement policy; ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true was used for this scoped apply.
